items.hook: BCA found that boutique condo projects tend to record more construction defects than lar
items.caption:
BCA found that boutique condo projects tend to record more construction defects than larger developments. If you are buying into a smaller project, do not rush through the handover. Budget time for a proper inspection and consider bringing in an independent inspector before you collect your keys. Get the full picture on any project at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to a friend who is house hunting.
items.cap_zh:
建屋局（BCA）发现，小型condo项目的建筑瑕疵通常比大型项目更多。如果你正在购买小型项目，交钥匙前千万别急。预留时间做彻底检查，考虑聘请独立验房师。在propsight.sg查看更多项目数据，链接在bio。

把这个发给正在看房的朋友。

items.hook: If you have ever wondered why the units you wanted were already gone on launch day, this
items.caption:
If you have ever wondered why the units you wanted were already gone on launch day, this may explain it. Agents have been getting access to condo units before regular buyers at some launches, a practice now under regulatory scrutiny. Tighter rules could be on the way, which would mean launch ballots are the same for everyone regardless of who your agent is. Track new launch sell-through data and see what is actually moving at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
如果你曾经纳闷，为什么心仪的condo单位在发售当天就已经被选走，这可能就是原因。部分项目发售时，代理在普通买家之前就获得了优先选购资格，监管机构目前正在审查这一做法。更严格的规定可能即将出台，届时所有买家的抽签机会将真正平等，不再取决于你有没有认识的代理。访问propsight.sg查看新盘实时数据，链接在简介里。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: Lentor Gardens Residences drew 5,000 visitors over one preview weekend, one of the stron
items.caption:
Lentor Gardens Residences drew 5,000 visitors over one preview weekend, one of the strongest early showings for a new launch in recent memory. That level of interest typically shortens decision windows and can push final transacted prices above the initial guide. If you are keen, your loan approval should be in hand before the actual launch opens, not after. Run the numbers and track the latest data free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
Lentor Gardens Residences 的预览周末吸引了5,000名访客，是近期新盘中相当亮眼的开局。这样的热度往往意味着单位很快售罄，最终成交价也可能比指导价更高。如果你有意购买，现在就该把贷款资格信办好，不要等到开售当天才手忙脚乱。更多数据免费查阅，欢迎到 propsight.sg，链接在简介。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Your flat may be worth more than the agent says.
The PropSight tools are free to use.
